title: Xenial Dense Norwegian Shirataki Noodles
description: A citrusy and dense Norwegian dish featuring shirataki noodles, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with a miso marinade and raw-friendly ingredients. This dish combines the simplicity of shirataki noodles with the richness of miso and citrus flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, lemon juice, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the shirataki noodles to the marinade and toss to coat.
Let the noodles marinate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
In a small bowl, mix together salt and black pepper.
Sprinkle the salt and pepper mixture over the marinated noodles and toss to coat.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and dill.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
Before serving, give the noodles a good toss to redistribute the marinade.
